description: Extract AI M&A transaction details from news articles and deal pages

questions.question: Is this page about a specific M&A transaction (acquisition, merger, or buyout) involving a company in the AI, machine learning, or data science space? Look for deal announcements, press releases, or news coverage of a specific transaction. General industry reports or listicles do NOT count.

disqualify_rules.reason: Page is not about a specific M&A transaction

categories.name: DEAL_FOUND
categories.description: Valid AI M&A transaction with extractable details

categories.name: NOT_MNA
categories.description: Page is not about an M&A transaction or not AI-related

categories.name: INSUFFICIENT_INFO
categories.description: Appears to be M&A but cannot extract meaningful deal details

questions.question: Is this page about a specific M&A transaction (acquisition, merger, or buyout) between named companies?
Does the target company or acquirer primarily operate in AI, machine learning, data science, or a closely related field?
What type of deal is this?
What is the name of the acquiring company (the buyer)? Return the company name only.
What is the name of the company being acquired (the target)? Return the company name only.
What is the transaction value? Include currency symbol (e.g., '$1.2B', '$500M'). Return 'undisclosed' if not mentioned.
When was this deal announced or closed? Use YYYY-MM-DD format if possible, otherwise best approximation (e.g., '2025-01', 'Q1 2025').
What is the current status of the deal?

What is the primary AI sub-field of the target company? (e.g., NLP, computer vision, robotics, MLOps, generative AI, autonomous vehicles, healthcare AI, cybersecurity AI, AI wearables, conversational AI, etc.)
What is the stated rationale for the acquisition? (e.g., 'talent acquisition', 'technology integration', 'market expansion'). Return 'not stated' if not mentioned.

sufficiency_check.prompt_addition: This is a news article or deal page. Extract all M&A deal details you can find. If the page doesn't describe a specific acquisition/merger transaction, indicate that clearly.
